TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-hunting2_Buyung

S.FORM: aring sku ulaqi' kuwing ga tiku vaqun mu ga a miru' kuwing su tataykay na' ga.
S.TRANSL: 當我是孩子，開始有意識，童年開始讀書的時候。
Since I was a child, when I knew things, when I studied in my childhood.

S.FORM: mamaspat kung su kaal la ga rasun kung ni yava' mu musa' i ragiyax qumaluwap.
S.TRANSL: 我八歲的時候，我的爸爸帶我去山上打獵。
When I was eight years old, my father brought me to hunt in the mountain.

S.FORM: gumlu ng su nabakis gumlu ng su nabakis talan mu ru mitaal su vawwak.
S.TRANSL: 我跟著老人們，然後我看看…我看到山豬。
I followed the old people, and let me see…I saw boarss.

S.FORM: ru vahagun nha' ru qaluwapun nha' ru havun nha' la.
S.TRANSL: 然後，他們追山豬、抓到它並把它刺死。
Then, they chased the hog, caught it, and stabbed it.

S.FORM: sipanga' nha' ru gawng la ga as sayukan mian la.
S.TRANSL: 把山豬背到河邊時，我們燒山豬的毛。
When we carried the pig to the river, we burned the fur.

S.FORM: ru taqaru' sami maniq ga musa' sami lawwi su qutux ragiyax ru musa' i musa' sami tatak la maki sami tatak la ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後，結束吃肉以後，我們再去一座山…一個獵寮，去一個獵寮。
Then, finishing eating, again we went to one mountain- a hunting house… to a hunting house.

S.FORM: tiku nanabakis miyan ga yava' miyan yutas miyan ru' mama' miyan musa' qumbuwang su yapit la musa' qumbuwang su yapit la ru.
S.TRANSL: 這個…我們的老人們，我們的爸爸爺爺叔伯們，躲在樹叢中找飛鼠…一面躲著一面找飛鼠。
Well, our elders- our father, grandfather, and uncles, hid in the bush to look for flying squirrels.

S.FORM: e kiya ku vaq s i mru' ga niya maras su saying ku sinbu' nha' ka yapit.
S.TRANSL: 有射很準的人，會帶兩隻他們射到的飛鼠。
For those who shoot well, they will bring two flying squirrels.

S.FORM: s kiya ku ini' qavaq ga ini' sbu' ga anya asi pqabaqava' ru muwah tatak.
S.TRANSL: 有射不準，或沒有射到的人，他們會兩手空空回來獵寮。
For those who don't shoot well or didn't shoot anything, they came back to the hunting house bare-handed.

S.FORM: ru m mapatisan ru manuvuag su quwaw la ru taihuk i ska' mahngan la ga maqilaap la.
S.TRANSL: 然後，我們互相聊天、喝酒到半夜、然後睡覺。
Then, we chatted with each other and drank wine until the middle of the night; and then we slept.

S.FORM: ru mtutul sami kahavaw la ga magagaang sami gi musa' i qumavuwang lawwi su e yapit vahut hoN tikuxi'.
S.TRANSL: 我們全部醒來後，我們分散因為要再去獵飛鼠、松鼠、和竹雞。
After we all woke up, we separated because we went hunting again for flying squirrels, squirrels, and pheasants.

S.FORM: kya ku ruma' ga niyan sunbu' ga maras su tiku saying yapit qutux ku qavahaniq qutux ku vahut.
S.TRANSL: 有一些人有射到東西，會帶回一隻竹雞、兩隻飛鼠、一隻鳥和一隻松鼠。
There are some who shot something and they would bring one pheasant, two flying squirrels, one bird, and one squirrel.

S.FORM: ru taihuk tatak ru l la squnun nha' la ga payux sinvu' nha' la ga manananak na qasinu.
S.TRANSL: 然後到達獵寮之後，他們把獵物放在一起，很多獵物放在一起會變成很多很奇怪的動物。
Then arriving the hunting house, they put their trophies together; many trophies put together seemed to be many strange beasts.

S.FORM: ru maqas sami kahabaw maha maqariyat ta' la.
S.TRANSL: 我們很高興並說我們很幸運。
We were all glad and we said that we were lucky.
